description: Input schema for merchant encounter actions

action_schema.action: string — buy | sell | barter | browse | leave
action_schema.item_id: string — item being transacted (null for browse/leave)
action_schema.base_price: number — PHB base price in gold
action_schema.roll: number — Persuasion check result for barter (null if not bartering)
action_schema.character_id: string — which PC is making the transaction

action_rules.buy: Requires item_id, quantity. Final price = base_price * price_modifier * quantity. Deduct from party_gold.
action_rules.sell: Requires item_id, quantity. Sell price = base_price * 0.5 * quantity. Add to party_gold.
action_rules.barter: Requires item_id, roll. DC 15 Persuasion. Success = 10% discount. Beat by 5+ = 20% discount.
action_rules.browse: No fields required. Display full inventory.
